signals.name: charger_state
signals.label: Charger state
signals.operating_range_text: 0 : WAITING 1 : READY TO CHARGE ( 01 ) 2 : CHARGING ( 02 ) 3 : FAULT ( 03 )

enum.0: WAITING 1 : READY TO CHARGE ( 01 ) 2 : CHARGING ( 02 ) 3 : FAULT ( 03 )

signals.name: charger_status
signals.label: CHARGER STATUS
signals.operating_range_text: 0: 미사용, 1: 충전대기, 2: 충전중, 3: 충전완료, 4: 보상충전중, 5: 충전에러, 6: 충전경고, 7~15: 미사용

signals.name: charging_mode
signals.label: Charging Mode
signals.operating_range_text: 0 : Current Mode 1 : Voltage Mode 충전시 항상 Voltage Mode로 동작할 것

enum.0: Current Mode 1 : Voltage Mode 충전시 항상 Voltage Mode로 동작할 것

signals.name: warn_code
signals.label: Warn code
signals.operating_range_text: 0: WARNING - NORMAL STATE 1: WARNING - INPUT OVER VOLT 2: WARNING - INPUT UNDER VOLT 3: WARNING - OVER TEMP 4: WARNING - LOW TEMP 5: WARNING - 5V 1CH OVER CURRENT 6. WARNING - 5V 2CH OVER CURRENT 7. WARRING - 12V 1CH OVER CURRENT 8. WARRING - 12V 2CH OVER CURRENT 9. WARNING - 24V 1CH OVER CURRENT 10~ 미사용, always 0

enum.0: WARNING - NORMAL STATE 1: WARNING - INPUT OVER VOLT 2: WARNING - INPUT UNDER VOLT 3: WARNING - OVER TEMP 4: WARNING - LOW TEMP 5: WARNING - 5V 1CH OVER CURRENT 6. WARNING - 5V 2CH OVER CURRENT 7. WARRING - 12V 1CH OVER CURRENT 8. WARRING - 12V 2CH OVER CURRENT 9. WARNING - 24V 1CH OVER CURRENT 10~ 미사용

signals.name: error_code
signals.label: Error code
signals.operating_range_text: 0: 에러없음, 1: FAULT - ADCU CAN COMM. 2: FAULT - BATTERY PACK CAN COMM. 3: FAULT - VCU CAN COMM. 4: FAULT - DCDC CONVERTER CAN COMM. 5~ 미사용

enum.1: FAULT - ADCU CAN COMM. 2: FAULT - BATTERY PACK CAN COMM. 3: FAULT - VCU CAN COMM. 4: FAULT - DCDC CONVERTER CAN COMM. 5~ 미사용

signals.name: warn_code
signals.label: Warn code
signals.operating_range_text: 0: WARNING - NORMAL STATE 1: WARNING - CHARGER CAN COMM. 2~ 미사용

enum.0: WARNING - NORMAL STATE 1: WARNING - CHARGER CAN COMM. 2~ 미사용

signals.operating_range_text: 0: WARNING - NORMAL STATE 101,121,141,161 - TRACTION MOTOR CAN ERROR 102,122,142,162 - TRACTION MOTOR ENCODER ERROR 103,123,143,163 - TRACTION MOTOR OVER TEMP 104,124,144,164 - TRACTION MOTOR TEMP SENSOR ERROR 105,125,145,165 - TRACTION MOTOR CONTROLLER OVER TEMP 106,126,146,166 - TRACTION MOTOR CONTROLLER UNDER TEMP 107,127,147,167 - TRACTION MOTOR OVER CURRENT 108,128,148,168 - TRACTION MOTOR MISCELLANEOUS ERRORS 109,129,149,169 - STEERING MOTOR CAN ERROR 110,130,150,170 - STEERING MOTOR ENCODER ERROR 111,131,151,171 - STEERING MOTOR OVER TEMP 112,132,152,172 - STEERING MOTOR OVER CURRENT 113,133,153,173 - STEERING MOTOR MISCELLANEOUS ERRORS 114,134,154,174 - STEERING MOTOR CONTROLLER OVER TEMP 115,135,155,175 - STEERING MOTOR HOME REFERENCE TOLERANCE FAULT 116,136,156,176 - STEERING MOTOR MISCELLANEOUS ERRORS

enum.175: STEERING MOTOR HOME REFERENCE TOLERANCE FAULT 116

signals.name: error_code
signals.label: Error code
signals.operating_range_text: 0: NORMAL STATE 1: FAULT - DATA RECIVE ERROR ( 01 ) 2: FAULT - ALIVE COUNTER ERROR ( 02 ) 3: FAULT - ADCU STOP ( 03 )

enum.0: NORMAL STATE 1: FAULT - DATA RECIVE ERROR ( 01 ) 2: FAULT - ALIVE COUNTER ERROR ( 02 ) 3: FAULT - ADCU STOP ( 03 )

signals.name: alive_counter
signals.label: Alive counter
signals.description: Alive_Counter_Byte3~6, uint32 big-endian (Byte3=MSB) (ADCU_HAERT BEAT 수신 중단 시, 1000ms 주기마다 1씩 증가)
